name_cn:
Genuine leather
游댠 Medium calfskin Anagram Tote handbag, linen patchwork tote features游눤 No flashy designs, simple and practical type游꺝 The design of the long and short shoulder straps looks quite good, the size is quite suitable, not too big游꺛 Easily meets daily needs. In addition to the regular classic shoulder strap游떁, it also features a unique woven handle仇벒잺, adding a lot of stylishness and design sense to the simple look. The bag body is embossed with the iconic Anagram logo游꺜, the recognizability and fashion sense are spot on游땢, and it is comfortable and photogenic游땘. Can be used with a longer calfskin top handle or a shorter handmade woven handle游꺞. This size version is made of calfskin游녶. The front is decorated with a large Anagram游눎. "Carried by shoulder or top handle". Calfskin strap fastening* Two internal slip pockets*Calfskin lining救넖잺
Dimensions: 29CM~25CM~14CM
Style No.: 9300 Full Leather
Color: Grey Berry
